---
title: Recette facile de longe de porc à la mijoteuse

categories:
  - Porc
  - Mijoteuse
---

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-toolbar">
<a href="../ajouter_recette/?yaml=%2Frecettes%2Frepas%2Flonge-porc-mijoteuse.yaml" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">✏️ Modifier cette recette</a>
<div class="recipe-toolbar-actions">
<button id="recipe-cart-toggle" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success btn-sm">Ajouter au panier</button>
<button id="recipe-reading-mode" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">🍳 Mode cuisson</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" onclick="window.print()">🖨️ Imprimer</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" onclick="navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href)">🔗 Copier le lien</button>
</div>
</div>
<div class="recipe-facts-grid"><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Source</span><strong>https://bonpourtoi.ca/recettes/recette-facile-de-longe-de-porc-a-la-mijoteuse/?cookmode</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps préparation</span><strong>15 min</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps cuisson</span><strong>320 min</strong></div></div>
```

```{=html}
<script id="recipe-cart-data" type="application/json">{"id":"/recettes/repas/longe-porc-mijoteuse.qmd","title":"Recette facile de longe de porc à la mijoteuse","url":"/recettes/repas/longe-porc-mijoteuse.qmd","portions_base":6,"portions_target":6,"ingredients":[{"nom":"Longe de porc","uni":"longe","qte":1,"rangee":"Viandes et substituts"},{"nom":"Paprika","uni":"c. à thé","qte":2,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Thym séché","uni":"c. à thé","qte":2,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Sel de table","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":0.5,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poudre d’oignon","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":0.5,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Poudre d’ail","uni":"c. à thé","qte":1,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Piment de Cayenne moulu","uni":"c. à thé","qte":0.25,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poivre noir moulu","uni":"c. à thé","qte":0.25,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Huile végétale","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":2,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Beurre non salé","uni":"tasse","qte":0.66,"rangee":"Produits laitiers et oeufs"},{"nom":"Ail frais haché","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":2,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Miel","uni":"tasse","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Vinaigre de cidre de pomme","uni":"tasse","qte":0.33,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Sel de table","uni":"pincée","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Fécule de maïs","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Eau","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":2,"rangee":"Epicerie"}]}</script>
<script src="/includes/recipe-cart.js"></script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-meta-badges"><span class="recipe-meta-badge">Difficulté: Facile</span></div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-servings-control"><label for="servings-input" class="form-label mb-1">Ajuster les portions</label><div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-2"><input id="servings-input" class="form-control form-control-sm" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="6" style="max-width: 110px;"><button id="servings-reset" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" type="button">Réinitialiser</button><span class="text-muted small">Base: 6</span></div><div class="recipe-measure-mode"><span class="form-label mb-1 d-block">Affichage des quantités</span><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Mode de mesure"><button id="measure-mode-volume" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="volume">Volume</button><button id="measure-mode-mass" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="mass">Masse</button></div><div class="recipe-measure-submodes mt-2"><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Format volume"><button id="volume-unit-kitchen" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">Cuillères / tasse</button><button id="volume-unit-ml" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">mL</button></div><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm ms-2" role="group" aria-label="Format masse"><button id="mass-unit-g" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">g</button><button id="mass-unit-lbs" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">lbs</button></div></div><span class="text-muted small d-block mt-1">Les quantités converties sont affichées dans une couleur différente.</span></div></div>
```

## Valeurs nutritives

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-nutrition-block"><div class="recipe-nutrition-cards"><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Calories</span><strong>243 kcal</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Protéines</span><strong>0,2 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Glucides</span><strong>1,2 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Lipides</span><strong>26,9 g</strong></div></div><details class="recipe-nutrition-details"><summary class="recipe-nutrition-toggle">Afficher le détail complet</summary><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Estimations basées sur les ingrédients saisis. Portions de base: 6.</p><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Sources nutrition (ingrédients calculés): cnf_2015: 3 · fallback_local: 1.</p><table class="recipe-nutrition-table table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Nutriment</th><th>Par recette</th><th>Par portion</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><th scope="row">Calories</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1458.171" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">1458 kcal</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1458.171" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">243 kcal</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Protéines</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1.42356" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">1,4 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1.42356" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,2 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Lipides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="161.4356" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">161,4 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="161.4356" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">26,9 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Gras saturés</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="89.07733" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">89,1 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="89.07733" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">14,8 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Glucides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="7.49187" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">7,5 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="7.49187" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">1,2 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sucres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.099" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,1 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.099" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fibres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.0729" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,1 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.0729" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sodium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="18.879" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">19 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="18.879" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">3 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Potassium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="39.843" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">40 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="39.843" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">7 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Calcium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="39.762" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">40 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="39.762" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">7 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fer</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.08487" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,1 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.08487" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Magnésium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="3.543" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">4 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="3.543" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">1 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Zinc</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.15612" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,2 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.15612" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sélénium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1.8768" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">1,9 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1.8768" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,3 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine C</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine B12</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.2805" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,3 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.2805" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine A (EAR)</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1128.6" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">1129 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1128.6" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">188 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine D</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="2.475" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">2,5 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="2.475" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,4 ug</td></tr></tbody></table><details class="recipe-nutrition-missing"><summary>Ingrédients non comptabilisés (12)</summary><ul><li><code>Longe de porc</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Paprika</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Thym séché</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Sel de table</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Poudre d’oignon</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Poudre d’ail</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Piment de Cayenne moulu</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Poivre noir moulu</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Ail frais haché</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Miel</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Vinaigre de cidre de pomme</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Sel de table</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li></ul></details></details></div>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const key='recipe_reading_mode';
let wakeLock=null;
const apply=(on)=>{document.body.classList.toggle('reading-mode', on);};
const requestWake=async()=>{try{if('wakeLock' in navigator){wakeLock=await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen');}}catch(e){}};
const releaseWake=async()=>{try{if(wakeLock){await wakeLock.release(); wakeLock=null;}}catch(e){}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>{
const btn=document.getElementById('recipe-reading-mode');
const saved=localStorage.getItem(key)==='1'; apply(saved); if(saved) requestWake();
if(!btn) return;
const refresh=()=>{btn.classList.toggle('active', document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'));}; refresh();
btn.addEventListener('click', async()=>{const next=!document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'); apply(next); localStorage.setItem(key, next?'1':'0'); refresh(); if(next){await requestWake();} else {await releaseWake();}});
});
})();</script>
```

## Ingrédients

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-grocery-actions">
<button id="copy-grocery-list" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">📋 Générer la liste d'épicerie</button>
<button id="reset-recipe-checks" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">↺ Réinitialiser les cases</button>
<span id="grocery-copy-feedback" class="text-muted small"></span>
</div>
```

### Préparation de la longe de porc et de la sauce

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Longe de porc" data-ingredient-unit="longe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">longe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Longe de porc</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Paprika" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Paprika</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Thym séché" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Thym séché</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel de table" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="9.1275" data-base-volume-ml="7.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel de table</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Poudre d’oignon" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="7.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre d’oignon</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Poudre d’ail" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre d’ail</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Piment de Cayenne moulu" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Piment de Cayenne moulu</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre noir moulu" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre noir moulu</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile végétale" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile végétale</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Beurre non salé" data-ingredient-unit="tasse" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="165" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.66">0.66</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre non salé</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Ail frais haché" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Ail frais haché</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Miel" data-ingredient-unit="tasse" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="355" data-base-volume-ml="250" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Miel</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Vinaigre de cidre de pomme" data-ingredient-unit="tasse" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="82.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.33">0.33</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Vinaigre de cidre de pomme</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel de table" data-ingredient-unit="pincée" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">pincée</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel de table</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Fécule de maïs" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="8.115" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Fécule de maïs</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Eau" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="29.946" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Eau</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

## Équipements

### Préparation de la longe de porc et de la sauce

- Bol
- Poêle
- Mijoteuse
- Planche
- Assiette de service
- Papier d'aluminium
- Casserole
- Fouet

## Préparation

### Préparation de la longe de porc et de la sauce

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Longe de porc" data-ingredient-unit="longe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">longe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Longe de porc</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Éponger soigneusement la longe de porc avec du papier absorbant pour retirer l’excédent d’humidité.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Paprika" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Paprika</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Thym séché" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Thym séché</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel de table" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="9.1275" data-base-volume-ml="7.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel de table</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Poudre d’oignon" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="7.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.5">0.5</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre d’oignon</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Poudre d’ail" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poudre d’ail</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Piment de Cayenne moulu" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Piment de Cayenne moulu</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre noir moulu" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre noir moulu</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Dans un petit bol, mélanger le paprika, le thym, le sel, la poudre d’oignon, la poudre d’ail, le piment de Cayenne et le poivre. Frotter ce mélange d’épices sur toute la surface de la longe pour bien l’enrober.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile végétale" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile végétale</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Chauffer l’huile végétale dans une grande poêle à feu moyen. Déposer la longe et la faire dorer sur toutes ses faces, environ 2 minutes par côté, jusqu’à l’obtention d’une belle croûte dorée. Transférer la viande dans la mijoteuse.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="120">⏱️ 2 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Beurre non salé" data-ingredient-unit="tasse" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="165" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.66">0.66</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre non salé</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Ail frais haché" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Ail frais haché</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Miel" data-ingredient-unit="tasse" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="355" data-base-volume-ml="250" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Miel</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Vinaigre de cidre de pomme" data-ingredient-unit="tasse" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="82.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.33">0.33</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Vinaigre de cidre de pomme</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel de table" data-ingredient-unit="pincée" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">pincée</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel de table</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 4</span></label></div><p>Dans la même poêle, faire fondre le beurre à feu moyen, puis ajouter l’ail haché. Cuire 1 minute, jusqu’à ce qu’il soit légèrement doré. Incorporer le miel, le vinaigre de cidre et le sel. Porter à ébullition et laisser mijoter 30 secondes.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="60">⏱️ 1 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 5</span></label></div><p>Verser la sauce chaude sur la longe de porc. Couvrir et cuire à basse température pendant 5 heures, jusqu’à ce que la viande soit tendre.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="18000">⏱️ 5 h</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 6</span></label></div><p>Retirer la longe de la mijoteuse et la déposer sur une planche ou une assiette de service. Couvrir légèrement d’un papier d’aluminium et laisser reposer 15 minutes.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="900">⏱️ 15 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Fécule de maïs" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="8.115" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Fécule de maïs</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Eau" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="29.946" data-base-volume-ml="30" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Eau</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 7</span></label></div><p>Verser le jus de cuisson dans une petite casserole. Délayer la fécule de maïs dans l’eau, puis l’ajouter au jus. Porter à ébullition à feu moyen vif en fouettant et laisser mijoter 5 minutes, jusqu’à ce que la sauce épaississe et prenne une texture sirupeuse.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="300">⏱️ 5 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 8</span></label></div><p>Trancher la viande et servir avec une généreuse quantité de sauce.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){const input=document.getElementById('servings-input');const reset=document.getElementById('servings-reset');const btnVolume=document.getElementById('measure-mode-volume');const btnMass=document.getElementById('measure-mode-mass');const btnVolKitchen=document.getElementById('volume-unit-kitchen');const btnVolMl=document.getElementById('volume-unit-ml');const btnMassG=document.getElementById('mass-unit-g');const btnMassLbs=document.getElementById('mass-unit-lbs');const hasScaler=!!input;const base=6;const modeKey='recipe_measure_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const volumeUnitKey='recipe_volume_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const massUnitKey='recipe_mass_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;let mode=(localStorage.getItem(modeKey)==='mass')?'mass':'volume';let volumeUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(volumeUnitKey)==='ml')?'ml':'kitchen';let massUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(massUnitKey)==='lbs')?'lbs':'g';const format=(n)=>{const r=Math.round(n*100)/100; return (Math.abs(r-Math.round(r))<1e-9)?String(Math.round(r)):String(r).replace('.',',');};const normalize=(u)=>String(u||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim();const massFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'g':1,'gramme':1,'grammes':1,'gram':1,'grams':1,'kg':1000,'kilogramme':1000,'kilogrammes':1000,'lb':453.59237,'lbs':453.59237,'oz':28.34952,'once':28.34952,'onces':28.34952}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const volumeFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'ml':1,'millilitre':1,'millilitres':1,'l':1000,'litre':1000,'litres':1000,'t':250,'tasse':250,'tasses':250,'c a soupe':15,'cuillere a soupe':15,'cuilleres a soupe':15,'c a table':15,'c s':15,'c.s.':15,'c a the':5,'cuillere a the':5,'cuilleres a the':5,'c t':5,'c.t.':5}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const isKitchenUnit=(u)=>{const n=normalize(u); return n==='tasse'||n==='t'||n==='c a soupe'||n==='cuillere a soupe'||n==='cuilleres a soupe'||n==='c a table'||n==='c s'||n==='c.s.'||n==='c a the'||n==='cuillere a the'||n==='cuilleres a the'||n==='c t'||n==='c.t.';};const chooseKitchenUnit=(volumeMl,explicit)=>{if(isKitchenUnit(explicit)) return explicit; if(!Number.isFinite(volumeMl)) return 'c. à thé'; if(volumeMl>=125) return 'tasse'; if(volumeMl>=7.5) return 'c. à soupe'; return 'c. à thé';};const setDerived=(label,qNode,uNode,isDerived)=>{if(qNode) qNode.classList.toggle('ingredient-approx',!!isDerived);};const updateIngredientForMode=(li,ratio)=>{const qNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-qte'); const uNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-uni'); const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); if(!qNode||!label) return false; const baseMass=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseMassG||''); const baseVolume=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseVolumeMl||''); const explicitMass=li.dataset.explicitMass==='1'; const explicitVolume=li.dataset.explicitVolume==='1'; const explicitUnitMass=li.dataset.explicitUnitMass||'g'; const explicitUnitVolume=li.dataset.explicitUnitVolume||'ml'; let qty=NaN; let unit=''; let derived=false; if(mode==='mass'&&Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?'lbs':'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!(explicitMass&&normalize(explicitUnitMass)===normalize(unit));} else if(mode==='volume'&&Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!(explicitVolume&&normalize(explicitUnitVolume)===normalize(unit));} else if(Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!explicitVolume;} else if(Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?'lbs':'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!explicitMass;} else {li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated'); return false;} qNode.textContent=format(qty); if(uNode){uNode.textContent=unit;} li.setAttribute('data-ingredient-unit', unit); li.setAttribute('data-live-updated','1'); setDerived(label,qNode,uNode,derived); return true;};const applyModeButtons=()=>{if(btnVolume) btnVolume.classList.toggle('active', mode==='volume'); if(btnMass) btnMass.classList.toggle('active', mode==='mass'); if(btnVolKitchen) btnVolKitchen.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='kitchen'); if(btnVolMl) btnVolMl.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='ml'); if(btnMassG) btnMassG.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='g'); if(btnMassLbs) btnMassLbs.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='lbs');};const update=()=>{const current=hasScaler?parseFloat(input.value):base;const ratio=(hasScaler&&Number.isFinite(current)&&current>0)?(current/base):1;document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-ingredient').forEach((li)=>{if(!updateIngredientForMode(li,ratio)){li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated');}});document.querySelectorAll('.ingredient-qte[data-base]').forEach((el)=>{if(el.closest('.recipe-ingredient[data-live-updated="1"]')) return;const b=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base'));if(Number.isFinite(b)){el.textContent=format(b*ratio);} });document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-total[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal*ratio;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-per-portion[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal/base;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});};if(input){input.addEventListener('input', update);} if(reset&&input){reset.addEventListener('click', ()=>{input.value=String(base); update();});}if(btnVolume){btnVolume.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='volume'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'volume'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMass){btnMass.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='mass'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'mass'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolKitchen){btnVolKitchen.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='kitchen'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'kitchen'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolMl){btnVolMl.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='ml'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'ml'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassG){btnMassG.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='g'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'g'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassLbs){btnMassLbs.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='lbs'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'lbs'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}applyModeButtons();update();})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id="recipe-timer-dock" class="recipe-timer-dock d-none"><strong>Minuteur</strong> <span id="recipe-timer-label"></span> <span id="recipe-timer-remaining"></span> <button id="recipe-timer-stop" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light" type="button">Arrêter</button></div>
<script>(function(){
let timer=null, target=0, audioCtx=null, alarmInterval=null, alarmTimeout=null;
const pad=(n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
const fmt=(s)=>{const h=Math.floor(s/3600), m=Math.floor((s%3600)/60), sec=s%60; return h>0?`${h}:${pad(m)}:${pad(sec)}`:`${m}:${pad(sec)}`;};
const ensureAudio=async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext; if(!Ctx) return null; if(!audioCtx) audioCtx=new Ctx(); if(audioCtx.state==='suspended'){try{await audioCtx.resume();}catch(e){}} return audioCtx;};
const stopAlarm=()=>{if(alarmInterval){clearInterval(alarmInterval); alarmInterval=null;} if(alarmTimeout){clearTimeout(alarmTimeout); alarmTimeout=null;}};
const playBeep=(ctx,freq)=>{const t=ctx.currentTime+0.01; const osc=ctx.createOscillator(); const gain=ctx.createGain(); osc.type='sawtooth'; osc.frequency.value=freq; gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001,t); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.42,t+0.015); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.19); osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination); osc.start(t); osc.stop(t+0.2);};
const startAlarm=async()=>{const ctx=await ensureAudio(); if(!ctx) return; stopAlarm(); const notes=[1760,1480,2093,1760,2349,1760]; let i=0; const ring=()=>{playBeep(ctx,notes[i%notes.length]); i+=1;}; ring(); alarmInterval=setInterval(ring,250); alarmTimeout=setTimeout(stopAlarm,15000);};
const dock=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-dock'); const rem=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-remaining'); const lab=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-label'); const stop=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-stop');
const hide=()=>{if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} stopAlarm(); if(dock) dock.classList.add('d-none');};
document.addEventListener('click',async(e)=>{const b=e.target.closest('.recipe-timer-btn'); if(!b) return; const secs=parseInt(b.dataset.seconds||'0',10); if(!secs||secs<1) return; await ensureAudio(); stopAlarm(); if(timer) clearInterval(timer); target=Date.now()+secs*1000; if(lab) lab.textContent=b.textContent.replace('⏱️','').trim(); if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); timer=setInterval(()=>{const left=Math.max(0, Math.round((target-Date.now())/1000)); if(rem) rem.textContent=fmt(left); if(left<=0){if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} if(rem) rem.textContent='Terminé!'; if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); startAlarm();}},250);});
if(stop) stop.addEventListener('click', hide);
})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const pageKey='recipe_check_state:'+window.location.pathname;
const save=()=>{const state={}; document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{state[i]=cb.checked?1:0;}); localStorage.setItem(pageKey, JSON.stringify(state));};
const load=()=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(pageKey)||'{}'); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{cb.checked=!!s[i];});}catch(e){}};
const reset=()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.checked=false); save();};
const textFromLi=(li)=>{const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); return label?label.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():li.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();};
const copyGroceries=async()=>{const items=[...document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-grocery-list .recipe-ingredient')].filter(li=>!(li.querySelector('.recipe-ingredient-check')||{}).checked).map(textFromLi).filter(Boolean); const txt=items.length?items.map(x=>'- '+x).join('\n'):'(Aucun ingrédient restant)'; const fb=document.getElementById('grocery-copy-feedback'); try{if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){await navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);} else {window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt);} if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste copiée.';}catch(e){window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt); if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste prête à copier.';}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{load(); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.addEventListener('change',save)); const c=document.getElementById('copy-grocery-list'); if(c) c.addEventListener('click',copyGroceries); const r=document.getElementById('reset-recipe-checks'); if(r) r.addEventListener('click',reset);});
})();</script>
```
